description: DeepSeek Strategy D — changed from deepseek_sse (SSE format) to 400 Bad Request with JSON error body. Previous #350 showed network error with SSE approach (frontend couldn't process JSON Patch operations without initial state). Check if 400 triggers DeepSeek's error handling UI.
expected_behavior: DeepSeek frontend should display an error message instead of garbled network error text
notes: If 400 still shows network error, try: (1) 429 Too Many Requests, (2) 503 with retry-after header, (3) classify as Tier 1.5 (block works, custom warning not possible)
